title: Application of Part
doc_html:
§533.  Application of Part

This Part shall not become effective in any city, town, village or parish, until an ordinance of the governing authority adopting it has been passed and has been published in the official journal of the parish for at least thirty days.
doc_text:
§533.  Application of Part
This Part shall not become effective in any city, town, village or parish, until an ordinance of the governing authority adopting it has been passed and has been published in the official journal of the parish for at least thirty days.
